title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Given an `N x N` tic-tac-toe board containing `'X'`, `'O'`, and `' '` (empty), return: - `"X"` or `"O"` if that player has won - `"Pending"` if no winner and at least one empty cell exists - `"Draw"` otherwise

content.text: Given an `N x N` tic-tac-toe board containing `'X'`, `'O'`, and `' '` (empty), return: - `"X"` or `"O"` if that player has won - `"Pending"` if no winner and at least one empty cell exists - `"Draw"` otherwise

Given an `N x N` tic-tac-toe board containing `'X'`, `'O'`, and `' '` (empty), return: - `"X"` or `"O"` if that player has won - `"Pending"` if no winner and at least one empty cell exists - `"Draw"` otherwise
